title: Post-Training Optimization (Quantization)
description: Implement 4-bit/8-bit quantization techniques (e.g., GGUF, AWQ, EXL2) for LLMs. Master post-training optimization to reduce model footprint and enable high-throughput inference on consumer-grade hardware.
objectives: Implement 4-bit/8-bit quantization techniques (e.g., GGUF, AWQ, EXL2) for LLMs.
Master post-training optimization to reduce model footprint and enable high-throughput inference on consumer-grade hardware.
